meta.scope: Incremental audit for 2026 Numata Bench Press roster Lot 38-39. No A4 print layout, CSS, page rendering, database, or research-candidates mutation. Confirmed source rows are recorded at batch level only unless identity-safe database promotion is performed in a separate mutation.

processedAthletes.auditResult: Official HPA rows were found for both 2026 Numata single bench and 2026 Spring Ebetsu three-lift powerlifting. Both rows share exact Japanese name, birth year 1994, and BURSTLIMIT affiliation with the Lot 38 roster entry. No database.json mutation was performed in this isolated audit batch to avoid duplicate or uncontrolled promotion.
